Intraday post (01/Oct)

Window of Risk:

Window of Risk, Disbalance - Investigating the story that the market tells

Weekly:

No downside confirmation - Weekly post (29/Sept - 03/Oct)

ISM Manufacturing PMI today.

The sentiment is neutral. Algos will create realitively low reaction on the print now. Long-term sentiment is “good news are bad news” and vice versa.

Let’s scrutinize the positioning today…

INTRADAY POSTCoding today’s positioning:

Today’s positioning is a very asymmetric short fly pattern centered around 6647.48, with a net positive speed profile. The upside is pretty much supportive today, and above the upside pivot of 6667.45 it has a potential towards ~6690

The centroid is at 6658.70This is the main pivot for the day. During the power hour, it looks unbreakable. It is not sticky, it is rejecting, spot is either above or below it.

To the downside, the pivot is 6637.41If put skew is bid, the next the downside target is 6601, and if left-tail materializes, just as the positioning prices it (23.60% prob), the the target is 6585Otherwise it will just shot back up from either 6620 or 6600, and pin to the pivot.Or in case if the spot cannot take back the pivot before the powerhour, the local magnet is 6610 (weak one).

Momentum should reveal itself during the AM session. Watch where the spot opens relative to the centroid.The likelyhood drastically shifts. Market prices more probability to the downside, and higher vol, but there is a lot of speculative 0DTE positions open towards the target, so when those long puts print they will be closed generating local support through dealer buyback flows.

Today is a momentum trading day.
